notes.content: The European Languages and Transcultural Studies with German major will give students a deep understanding of European culture and history, including in a global context, with a particular expertise in German. Listed below are the lower division preparation courses for the major. To be considered for this major, you must complete the following courses by the end of spring before transfer: Two years of college level courses in the declared language or at least one year of high school in which the primary language of instruction was the declared language One course in European literature, culture, film or media. All courses must be taken for a letter grade. Note: High school foreign language classes will NOT satisfy major preparation requirements For information regarding preparation for this major and UCLA's transfer selection process, visit https:// elts.ucla.edu and https:// admission.ucla.edu . PLEASE NOTE: the community college courses listed below have been approved to satisfy the preparation for this major at UCLA, but they may not be exact equivalents of the UCLA courses.
notes.contentHtml:
The European Languages and Transcultural Studies with German major will give students a deep understanding of European culture and history, including in a global context, with a particular expertise in German.


Listed below are the lower division preparation courses for the major.


To be considered for this major, you must complete the following courses by the end of spring before transfer:

  • Two years of college level courses in the declared language or at least one year of high school in which the primary language of instruction was the declared language
  • One course in European literature, culture, film or media.

All courses must be taken for a letter grade.


Note: High school foreign language classes will NOT satisfy major preparation requirements


For information regarding preparation for this major and UCLA's transfer selection process, visit https://elts.ucla.edu and https://admission.ucla.edu.


PLEASE NOTE: the community college courses listed below have been approved to satisfy the preparation for this major at UCLA, but they may not be exact equivalents of the UCLA courses.

notes.content: Foreign language credit awarded by UCLA as a result of AP exams for students in the School of Letters and Science may be found here: https://admission.ucla.edu/admitted-students/ap-credit-the-college
notes.contentHtml: Foreign language credit awarded by UCLA as a result of AP exams for students in the School of Letters and Science may be found here: https://admission.ucla.edu/admitted-students/ap-credit-the-college
